user_request: Implement complete User authentication domain with login, registration, and password reset functionality
approach_selected: Full CQRS with event sourcing and separate read models

approaches_considered.name: Full CQRS with event sourcing
pros: Complete audit trail of all user actions
Easy to add new query projections

approaches_considered.name: Simple CRUD with repositories
cons: Hard to add audit trail later

pre_mortem_risks.risk: Password hashing algorithm not properly configured
pre_mortem_risks.mitigation: Use CodeIgniter's built-in password hashing with bcrypt, add comprehensive tests

pre_mortem_risks.risk: Email validation allows invalid or malicious input
pre_mortem_risks.mitigation: Create EmailAddress value object with strict RFC 5322 validation

pre_mortem_risks.risk: User enumeration attack via different error messages
pre_mortem_risks.mitigation: Return same generic error for login failures (wrong email or password)

pre_mortem_risks.risk: Missing rate limiting on authentication endpoints
pre_mortem_risks.mitigation: Add rate limiting middleware to login and registration endpoints

pre_mortem_risks.risk: Session tokens not properly invalidated on logout
pre_mortem_risks.mitigation: Implement proper session management with token blacklist
